# User Manual Verification Report (Sections 1-4)
Generated: 2026-01-28

## Summary
Verified sections 1-4 of USER-MANUAL.md (시작하기, 대시보드, 학생관리, 강사관리) against actual code implementation. Found multiple discrepancies between manual and code.

---

## Issues Found

### Section 1 (시작하기)

❌ **WRONG**: Manual says "비밀번호 찾기" feature exists in login page → Code has `/forgot-password` link but no implementation (src/app/login/page.tsx:L85)

❌ **WRONG**: Manual says "이메일로 인증 완료 후 로그인" → Code shows no email verification step, users can login immediately after registration (src/app/register/page.tsx)

❌ **WRONG**: Manual says registration requires "사업자등록번호" field → Code has NO business number field in registration form (src/app/register/page.tsx)

❌ **WRONG**: Manual says registration asks for "학원 주소" → Code has NO address field in registration form (src/app/register/page.tsx)

### Section 2 (대시보드)

❌ **WRONG**: Manual says "순수익" card shows "흑자/적자 표시" → Code only shows the number, no red/green or profit/loss indicator (src/app/page.tsx:L209-210)

⚠️ **MISSING**: Manual mentions "이번 달 현황" with timeline chart showing revenue trends → Could not verify this chart exists in dashboard code (src/app/page.tsx)

### Section 3 (학생관리)

❌ **WRONG**: Manual says student type options are "실기생 / 체대입시 / 일반" → Code only has "입시생 / 성인" (src/lib/types/student.ts:L327-330)

❌ **WRONG**: Manual says tabs are "재원, 휴원, 체험, 미등록, 퇴원, 졸업, 학교별" → Code shows "재원생, 휴원생, 퇴원생, 졸업생, 체험생, 미등록관리, 학교별" (labels differ: 재원→재원생, 미등록→미등록관리) (src/app/students/page.tsx:L203-209)

❌ **WRONG**: Manual says tab order is "재원, 휴원, 체험, 미등록, 퇴원, 졸업, 학교별" → Code has different order: "재원, 휴원, 퇴원, 졸업, 체험, 미등록, 학교별" (src/app/students/page.tsx:L203-209)

❌ **WRONG**: Manual says student form has "학년: 고1, 고2, 고3, N수, 중3 등" → Code Grade type only allows '고1' | '고2' | '고3' | 'N수' (no 중3) (src/lib/types/student.ts:L8-9)

❌ **WRONG**: Manual says "입시 전형, 목표 대학, 내신 평균, 모의고사 성적, 소개 학생 등의 학업 정보는 상담 신청 시 입력됩니다" → These fields are NOT in student form, confirmed (line 270)

❌ **WRONG**: Manual says student detail has tabs "기본 정보, 학원비, 출석, 상담, 시즌" → Could not find explicit tab structure in student detail page (src/app/students/[id]/page.tsx)

⚠️ **MISSING**: Manual says "기본 정보 탭" includes "QR 코드 (출석 체크용)" → Could not find QR code component in student detail (src/app/students/[id]/page.tsx, src/components/students/student-card.tsx)

⚠️ **MISSING**: Manual says "학원비 탭" includes "선납 결제 내역" → Could not verify if prepayment feature is shown in student detail (src/app/students/[id]/page.tsx)

⚠️ **MISSING**: Manual section 3.9 says "학년 진급" feature exists → Could not find grade promotion button or feature in students page (src/app/students/page.tsx)

### Section 4 (강사관리)

❌ **WRONG**: Manual says instructor salary type is "시급제 / 건당 / 월급 / 혼합" → Code has "시급제 / 수업당 / 월급제 / 혼합형" (labels differ: 건당→수업당, 월급→월급제, 혼합→혼합형) (src/lib/types/instructor.ts:L186-189, L218-221)

⚠️ **MISSING**: Manual says "오전 수업 단가, 오후 수업 단가, 저녁 수업 단가" → Code only has `hourly_rate`, no separate rates by time slot in instructor form (src/components/instructors/instructor-form.tsx)

⚠️ **MISSING**: Manual section 4.4 says "강사 출퇴근 관리" with "출근 체크" button in schedule page → Component exists (instructor-attendance.tsx) but couldn't verify workflow described in manual

---

## Sections Verified OK

✅ **Section 1.1**: Login/registration/onboarding pages exist
✅ **Section 1.3**: Login with email/password exists
✅ **Section 1.4**: Onboarding with sample data option exists
✅ **Section 2.1**: Dashboard has 4 stat cards (students, instructors, revenue, profit)
✅ **Section 2.2**: Dashboard has "미납 학원비", "휴원 종료 대기", "오늘 강사 일정", "오늘 상담 일정" sections
✅ **Section 3.1**: Students page has all 7 tabs (with label differences noted)
✅ **Section 3.2**: Student registration form exists with most fields
✅ **Section 3.3**: Trial student registration with unlimited trial dates (v3.6.4 feature)
✅ **Section 3.4**: Student edit functionality exists
✅ **Section 3.6**: Pause processing with credit options (carry over / refund / none)
✅ **Section 3.7**: Withdrawal processing exists
✅ **Section 3.8**: Graduation processing exists (고3/N수 only)
✅ **Section 3.10**: Credit system exists with detailed explanation
✅ **Section 4.1**: Instructor list with filters
✅ **Section 4.2**: Instructor registration with most fields (hire date, SSN, bank account, work days)
✅ **Section 4.2**: Instructor types (선생님 / 사무보조) exist
✅ **Section 4.2**: Tax types (3.3% / 4대보험 / 비과세) exist with correct rates

---

## Recommendations

1. **Update manual section 1.2**: Remove references to business number and address fields in registration, or add them to code
2. **Update manual section 1.2**: Remove "이메일로 인증 완료" or implement email verification
3. **Update manual section 3.2**: Change student type from "실기생/체대입시/일반" to "입시생/성인"
4. **Update manual section 3.1**: Fix tab labels and order to match code
5. **Update manual section 3.2**: Remove "중3" from grade options or add to code
6. **Update manual section 4.2**: Change salary type labels to match code ("수업당" not "건당", etc.)
7. **Verify and document**: Time slot rates for instructors, QR code feature, grade promotion feature

---
